testsuite.name: Flipkart Search, Filter and Product Validation

testcase.name: Verify search functionality
testcase.classname: Flipkart Search, Filter and Product Validation

error.message: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//input[@class='Vy9RSP']"} (Session info: chrome=144.0.7559.134) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.28.1', revision: '73f5ad48a2' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '21.0.9' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [01a1e0e0d38b1aaa646d893e48f0e118, findElement {using=xpath, value=//input[@class='Vy9RSP']}] Capabilities {acceptInsecureCerts: false, browserName: chrome, browserVersion: 144.0.7559.134, chrome: {chromedriverVersion: 144.0.7559.133 (7da823b1d59..., userDataDir: C:\Users\ApM\AppData\Local\...}, fedcm:accounts: true, goog:chromeOptions: {debuggerAddress: localhost:59653}, goog:processID: 22232, networkConnectionEnabled: false, pageLoadStrategy: normal, platformName: windows, proxy: Proxy(), se:cdp: ws://localhost:59653/devtoo..., se:cdpVersion: 144.0.7559.134, setWindowRect: true, strictFileInteractability: false, timeouts: {implicit: 0, pageLoad: 300000, script: 30000}, unhandledPromptBehavior: dismiss and notify, webauthn:extension:credBlob: true, webauthn:extension:largeBlob: true, webauthn:extension:minPinLength: true, webauthn:extension:prf: true, webauthn:virtualAuthenticators: true} Session ID: 01a1e0e0d38b1aaa646d893e48f0e118

Feb 18, 2026 8:00:13 AM tech.grasshopper.pdf.PDFCucumberReport collectReportConfiguration INFO: PDF report configuration YAML file not found. Using default settings.
@AutomationPractice Scenario: Verify search functionality # src/test/resources/Features/FlipkartTest.feature:7 Given I launch Flipkart application # StepDefinition.FlipkartTestSteps.i_launch_flipkart_application() When I search for product "iPhone 14" # StepDefinition.FlipkartTestSteps.i_search_for_product(java.lang.String) org.openqa.selenium.NoSuchElementException: no such element: Unable to locate element: {"method":"xpath","selector":"//input[@class='Vy9RSP']"} (Session info: chrome=144.0.7559.134) For documentation on this error, please visit: https://www.selenium.dev/documentation/webdriver/troubleshooting/errors#no-such-element-exception Build info: version: '4.28.1', revision: '73f5ad48a2' System info: Then I verify search results are displayed # StepDefinition.FlipkartTestSteps.i_verify_search_results()

Feb 18, 2026 7:59:28 AM org.openqa.selenium.devtools.CdpVersionFinder findNearestMatch WARNING: Unable to find CDP implementation matching 144 Feb 18, 2026 7:59:28 AM org.openqa.selenium.chromium.ChromiumDriver lambda$new$4 WARNING: Unable to find version of CDP to use for 144.0.7559.134. You may need to include a dependency on a specific version of the CDP using something similar to `org.seleniumhq.selenium:selenium-devtools-v86:4.28.1` where the version ("v86") matches the version of the chromium-based browser you're using and the version number of the artifact is the same as Selenium's.
